list.name: asset
list.label: Asset
list.query: SELECT code FROM base.assets WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND code IN (SELECT DISTINCT a.code FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id) ORDER BY code

targets.rawSql: SELECT metric_date::timestamptz AS time, rsi_14 AS value, a.code AS metric FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id WHERE $__timeFilter(metric_date::timestamptz) AND rsi_14 IS NOT NULL AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY time

panels.title: ATR % (Volatility)
panels.description: ATR as % of close price. Regime: low < 2% · normal 2-4% · high 4-6% · extreme > 6%

targets.rawSql: SELECT metric_date::timestamptz AS time, atr_pct AS value, a.code AS metric FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id WHERE $__timeFilter(metric_date::timestamptz) AND atr_pct IS NOT NULL AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY time

SELECT metric_date::timestamptz AS time, atr_14 AS value, a.code AS metric FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id WHERE $__timeFilter(metric_date::timestamptz) AND atr_14 IS NOT NULL AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Price vs SMA(50) vs SMA(200)
panels.description: Golden cross: SMA50 crosses above SMA200 (bullish). Death cross: SMA50 crosses below SMA200 (bearish).

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.metric_date::timestamptz AS time, m.close_price AS value, CONCAT(a.code, ' close') AS metric FROM base.asset_metrics_1d m JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = m.asset_id WHERE $__timeFilter(m.metric_date::timestamptz) AND m.is_final = true AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY time

SELECT metric_date::timestamptz AS time, sma_50 AS value, CONCAT(a.code, ' SMA50') AS metric FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id WHERE $__timeFilter(metric_date::timestamptz) AND sma_50 IS NOT NULL AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY time

SELECT metric_date::timestamptz AS time, sma_200 AS value, CONCAT(a.code, ' SMA200') AS metric FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id WHERE $__timeFilter(metric_date::timestamptz) AND sma_200 IS NOT NULL AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY time

SELECT metric_date::timestamptz AS time, macd_line AS value, CONCAT(a.code, ' MACD') AS metric FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id WHERE $__timeFilter(metric_date::timestamptz) AND macd_line IS NOT NULL AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY time

SELECT metric_date::timestamptz AS time, macd_signal AS value, CONCAT(a.code, ' Signal') AS metric FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id WHERE $__timeFilter(metric_date::timestamptz) AND macd_signal IS NOT NULL AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY time

SELECT metric_date::timestamptz AS time, macd_histogram AS value, CONCAT(a.code, ' Histogram') AS metric FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id WHERE $__timeFilter(metric_date::timestamptz) AND macd_histogram IS NOT NULL AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY time

SELECT a.code AS asset, i.metric_date, ROUND(i.rsi_14::numeric,1) AS rsi_14, ROUND(i.atr_pct::numeric,2) AS atr_pct, i.volatility_regime, ROUND(i.sma_50::numeric,2) AS sma_50, ROUND(i.sma_200::numeric,2) AS sma_200, ROUND(i.macd_line::numeric,4) AS macd_line FROM base.asset_indicators_1d i JOIN base.assets a ON a.id = i.asset_id WHERE i.metric_date = (SELECT MAX(metric_date) FROM base.asset_indicators_1d WHERE rsi_14 IS NOT NULL) AND a.code IN ($asset) ORDER BY a.code
